hero.description: Advanced dermatology and modern aesthetic treatments designed to improve your skin and reveal your natural glow.

about.title: Beyond the surface
about.description: We believe true skin health goes deeper than quick fixes. Our clinic combines medical expertise with advanced aesthetic technology to treat the root cause of your skin concerns. Every treatment is tailored to your unique biology.

doctor.title: Meet your skin specialist
doctor.description1: Led by Dr. Sawsan Madi, our team brings decades of combined medical experience to your aesthetic journey.
doctor.description2: We specialize in natural-looking results that enhance your unique features while prioritizing your long-term skin health.
doctor.name: Dr. Sawsan Madi

acne.title: Acne & skin health
acne.description: Personalized dermatology care for acne, pigmentation, and long-term skin maintenance.

botox.title: Botox & fillers
botox.description: Subtle enhancements that refresh your features without changing who you are.

laser.title: Laser treatments
laser.description: Advanced laser solutions for hair removal, pigmentation, texture, and scars — clinical laser solutions.

antiaging.title: Anti-aging solutions
antiaging.description: Target lines, volume loss, dullness, and tired skin with safe, proven treatments.

prp.title: PRP therapy
prp.description: Platelet-rich plasma treatments to stimulate collagen production and accelerate healing.

results.title: Care that puts you first
results.tailoredDesc: Customized treatment plans for every skin type and concern.

cta.title: Ready for radiant skin?
cta.description: Book your comprehensive consultation today. Our specialists will create a customized treatment plan tailored exclusively to your goals.

founderHero.title: A vision for radiant confidence.
founderHero.description: "I built Sawsan Madi Clinic because I believe true beauty comes from within. My mission is to empower you with the knowledge and treatments to feel confident in your own skin, every single day."

founderStory.title: My personal journey to better skin.
founderStory.p1: Growing up, I struggled with severe cystic acne. I remember the frustration of trying countless products and treatments, only to feel unseen by rushed doctors who didn't take the time to understand my skin's unique needs.
founderStory.p2: That experience fundamentally changed my path. I decided to become the dermatologist I wished I had. I spent over a decade studying the intricate biology of the skin, traveling globally to master the most advanced laser technologies and holistic therapies.
founderStory.p3: When I opened Sawsan Madi Clinic, my goal was simple: to create a sanctuary where science meets empathy. We don't just treat symptoms; we listen to your story, understand your lifestyle, and build a tailored path to lasting skin health.
founderStory.p4: Welcome to a new standard of dermatological care. We're so glad you're here.

mission.title: Credentials & Philosophy
mission.boardDesc: Completed extensive medical training and residency in dermatology. She is dedicated to advancing the field of aesthetic medicine and actively contributes to pioneering research in laser therapeutics.
mission.quote: "Skin health is not about achieving an impossible standard of perfection. It's about restoring balance, enhancing your natural features, and giving you the quiet confidence to show up authentically in the world."

footer.description: Advanced dermatology and aesthetic treatments for clear, healthy skin.
footer.bottomline: Advanced dermatology for your unique skin.

contactPage.title: Book a Consultation
contactPage.description: Take the first step toward radiant, healthy skin. Fill out the form below or reach out to us directly.
